---
title: "Notes"
subtitle: "A modular knowledge base"
page-layout: full
---

Welcome. This site collects notes organized by topic.

Each topic has a web page for reading and a slide deck for presenting — both rendered from the same source.

## Topics

| Topic | Notes | Slides |
|-------|-------|--------|
| [Example Topic](topics/example-topic/index.qmd) | Reading view | [Slides](topics/example-topic/slides.qmd) |
| [26-05-26 Log](topics/26-05-26-log/index.qmd) | Reading view | [Slides](topics/26-05-26-log/slides.qmd) |

## How it works

- **Website** (`quarto render`) — full site published to GitHub Pages
- **Slides** (`quarto render --profile slides`) — reveal.js deck from the same content
- Shared content lives in `_content.qmd` partials; pages and slides both `{{< include >}}` them
